title: Savory Crispy Russian Lamb Pilaf
description: A winey, crispy, and flavorful Russian dish featuring ground cardamom, infuse-oil, and lamb, perfect for a special occasion, this jain-friendly recipe is cooked to perfection in a terracotta dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the infuse oil in the terracotta dish over medium heat.
Add the ground lamb and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the ground cardamom, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the rice and stir to combine, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
Add the white wine and vegetable broth, and bring to a boil.
Cover the dish with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
